sources_method: RPP: BEA official MARPP download (MARPP_MSA_2008_2024.csv inside apps.bea.gov zip), all-items index, US=100. FMR: HUD FY2026 revised FMR file (huduser.gov), 2-bedroom, effective Oct 1 2025. Unemployment: BLS LAUS via public API v2, metro NSA rate, May 2026 (preliminary). VAMC: va.gov facility pages.

vamc.name: No VAMC in the metro — outpatient clinic only: PFC Floyd K. Lindstrom Department of Veterans Affairs Clinic (VA Eastern Colorado Health Care System). Nearest full VA medical center: Rocky Mountain Regional VAMC, Aurora (Denver metro), roughly an hour north

metros.notes: Colorado Springs, CO MSA / HUD Metro FMR Area. Confirms the dataset's 'nearby' VA characterization: large multi-specialty clinic in town (3141 Centennial Blvd) with same-day Veterans Express Care; inpatient care is at Rocky Mountain Regional VAMC in Aurora.

vamc.name: Durham VA Medical Center (VA Durham Health Care System) — 508 Fulton St, Durham; 251-bed tertiary care and teaching hospital. Raleigh side is served by CBOCs (Raleigh VA Clinic and others) under the same system

metros.notes: BEA/BLS/HUD all treat Raleigh-Cary, NC and Durham-Chapel Hill, NC as separate metros. Values shown are Raleigh-Cary MSA. Durham-Chapel Hill from same sources: RPP 97.572 (2024); 2BR FMR $1,711 (FY2026, Durham-Chapel Hill HMFA); unemployment 3.2% May 2026 (LAUMT372050000000003).

vamc.name: Pittsburgh VA Medical Center-University Drive (VA Pittsburgh Healthcare System; second medical center campus: H. John Heinz III, O'Hara Township)

metros.notes: Pittsburgh, PA MSA / HUD Metro FMR Area. VA Pittsburgh operates two medical centers plus six CBOCs in the region — matches the dataset's 'multiple VA medical facilities' note.

vamc.name: No VAMC in the metro — outpatient clinics only (Huntsville VA Clinic, Huntsville West VA Clinic, Huntsville South VA specialty clinic; VA Birmingham Health Care System). Nearest full VA medical center: Birmingham VA Medical Center, roughly 100 miles south

metros.notes: Huntsville, AL MSA. Confirms the dataset's CBOC characterization; Huntsville South VA specialty clinic (cardiology, chemo infusion, podiatry, neurology) opened Feb 2026, expanding local coverage.

vamc.name: Boise VA Medical Center (VA Boise Health Care System) — 500 W Fort St, Boise

metros.notes: Boise City, ID MSA / HUD Metro FMR Area.

vamc.name: Oklahoma City VA Medical Center (VA Oklahoma City Health Care System) — 921 NE 13th St, Oklahoma City

metros.notes: Oklahoma City, OK MSA / HUD Metro FMR Area. System also runs 15 outpatient clinics including several within the metro (North OKC, South OKC, Norman, Yukon, Tinker AFB).

vamc.name: Tucson VA Medical Center (VA Southern Arizona Health Care System) — 3601 S 6th Ave, Tucson

metros.notes: Tucson, AZ MSA. System includes 7 CBOCs across southern Arizona plus Northwest and Southeast Tucson VA clinics inside the metro.

vamc.name: Mann-Grandstaff Department of Veterans Affairs Medical Center (VA Spokane Health Care System) — 4815 N Assembly St, Spokane

metros.notes: Spokane-Spokane Valley, WA MSA; HUD Spokane, WA HUD Metro FMR Area.

vamc.name: No VAMC in the metro — outpatient care only: William C. Tallent Department of Veterans Affairs Outpatient Clinic, Knoxville (VA Mountain Home Health Care System), plus Knox County VA Clinic. Nearest full VA medical center: James H. Quillen VAMC, Mountain Home/Johnson City, roughly 100 miles northeast

metros.notes: Knoxville, TN MSA / HUD Metro FMR Area. Confirms the dataset's CBOC characterization: multi-specialty outpatient clinic at 8033 Ray Mears Blvd; inpatient care is at Mountain Home VAMC (~1.5 hr drive).

vamc.name: Royal C. Johnson Veterans' Memorial Hospital / Sioux Falls VA Medical Center (VA Sioux Falls Health Care System) — 2501 W 22nd St, Sioux Falls

metros.notes: Sioux Falls, SD-MN MSA (BEA); HUD Sioux Falls, SD HUD Metro FMR Area. Full VAMC in a small metro, matching the dataset's note.

vamc.name: Fargo VA Medical Center (VA Fargo Health Care System) — 2101 Elm St N, Fargo

metros.notes: Fargo, ND-MN MSA. Despite small-metro size, Fargo hosts a full VAMC (primary care, cancer care, emergency services, surgery, mental health) — dataset's VAMC characterization confirmed.

vamc.name: Cheyenne VA Medical Center (VA Cheyenne Health Care System) — 2360 E Pershing Blvd, Cheyenne

metros.notes: Cheyenne, WY MSA. Contrary to the 'CBOC-only likely' expectation, Cheyenne hosts a full VA medical center (VA facility 442) — dataset's VAMC characterization confirmed.

vamc.name: No VAMC in the metro — outpatient clinics only: Clarksville VA Clinic, Montgomery County VA Clinic, Dalton Drive VA Dental Clinic, and Fort Campbell VA Clinic (VA Tennessee Valley Healthcare System). Nearest full VA medical center: Nashville VA Medical Center, roughly an hour southeast

metros.notes: Clarksville, TN-KY MSA / HUD Metro FMR Area. Confirms the dataset's CBOC characterization; VA has five clinic sites serving Clarksville veterans, and a new multi-specialty Clarksville VA clinic is slated to open by 2030.
